hypothesis: Integrating a specialized molecular image detection and segmentation pre-processing module—trained specifically to localize and isolate chemical structure depictions within heterogeneous scientific article layouts—into the single-agent extraction pipeline will yield statistically significant improvements in SMILES extraction F1 scores (exceeding 0.30) compared to the near-zero performance observed across all current methods in ChemX benchmarking, as measured on the complexes and small molecule datasets where SMILES extraction currently fails universally.
